title: hieracium caesium subsp. porrigens
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. porrigens, commonly known as the lesser hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system. Hieracium caesium subsp. porrigens can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
